basic_details.job_title: DMRC Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Assistant Manager/ Manager Posts
basic_details.short_information: Delhi Metro Rail Corporation (DMRC) Assistant Manager/Manager (Inspection) Notification 2026 has been released on 29 May 2026 on the official website www.delhimetrorail.com. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the DMRC Assistant Manager/Manager (Inspection) Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: All Posts: Minimum Age 55 years, Maximum Age 62 years.

qualification.education_qualification: Experience in inspection of manufacturing of Railway/Metro Coaches
qualification.details: Manager (Inspection) / Assistant Manager (Inspection): Work experience in the inspection of manufacturing of Railway/Metro Coaches, or, experience in maintenance of Railway/Metro Rolling Stock, or, experience in Railway Workshops/Railway Production Units.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for DMRC Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: http://www.delhimetrorail.com.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 19-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for DMRC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the offline application for the DMRC Assistant Manager/Manager (Inspection) posts is 19th June 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well in advance to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the total number of vacancies released by DMRC?
faq.answer: Delhi Metro Rail Corporation (DMRC) has announced a total of 1 vacancy for the post of Assistant Manager/Manager (Inspection) in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q3. What is the eligibility criteria for the DMRC Assistant Manager/Manager (Inspection) post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess relevant work experience in the inspection of manufacturing of Railway/Metro Coaches, or maintenance of Railway/Metro Rolling Stock, or Railway Workshops/Railway Production Units to be eligible for this post.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for applying to DMRC Manager/Assistant Manager posts?
faq.answer: The age limit for all the posts under this recruitment is between a minimum of 55 years and a maximum of 62 years. No age relaxation details are provided in the extracted data.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application fee for DMRC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There is no application fee required for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this DMRC recruitment. Candidates can apply without paying any fee.

faq.question: Q6. How will the candidates be selected for the DMRC posts?
faq.answer: The selection process for the DMRC Assistant Manager/Manager (Inspection) posts will primarily involve a Personal Interview followed by a Medical fitness examination.

faq.question: Q7. What is the salary offered for the DMRC Manager (Inspection) post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Manager (Inspection) post will receive a salary of Rs. 106300/- per month. This is a contractual position.

faq.question: Q8. What is the salary offered for the DMRC Assistant Manager (Inspection) post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Assistant Manager (Inspection) post will receive a salary of Rs. 82700/- per month. This is a contractual position.

faq.question: Q9. What is the mode of application for DMRC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application process for this DMRC recruitment is strictly offline. Candidates need to download the application form from the official website and submit it via post or as instructed in the notification.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and application form for DMRC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official website of Delhi Metro Rail Corporation (DMRC) at http://www.delhimetrorail.com. Links are also provided in the Important Links section of this article.
